context: Significant predictors of osteoporotic fractures: Clinical manifestation: Technique of Bone Densitometry: Site:  distal radius (= wrist bone density), os calcis Dose:  2-3 mrem Precision:  1-3% ◊  Standard of reference for diagnosis of osteoporosis in conjunction with Fracture Risk Assessment Tool at http://www.shef.ac.uk/FRAX/ for results of a 10-year probability of a major osteoporotic fracture in hip, spine, proximal humerus, distal forearm Technique: »  mobile x-ray source composed of 2 different photon energy levels (constant + pulsed) moves together with detection system »  rectilinear /
